examples/annotations.json: Root-relative semantic descriptions used by the example visualization.
project-prompt.md: Original project requirements, scope, and implementation brief.
pyproject.toml: Python package metadata, dependencies, and folderviz console-command declaration.
README.md: Installation, usage, feature, and development documentation.
src/folder_structure_visualizer/__init__: Marks the directory as the folder_structure_visualizer Python package.
src/folder_structure_visualizer/__main__: Allows the package to run through python -m folder_structure_visualizer.
src/folder_structure_visualizer/cli.py: Parses command-line options and coordinates scanning and output generation.
src/folder_structure_visualizer/models.p: Defines the shared tree-node and scan-result data models.
src/folder_structure_visualizer/render_h: Builds the interactive HTML viewer around a rendered SVG diagram.
src/folder_structure_visualizer/render_i: Invokes Mermaid CLI to render SVG and PNG image artifacts.
src/folder_structure_visualizer/render_m: Combines metadata, text tree, Mermaid graph, and warnings into Markdown.
Converts the shared tree model into a styled Mermaid graph.
src/folder_structure_visualizer/render_t: Converts the shared tree model into an annotated plain-text hierarchy.
Scans directories, applies filters, and attaches path-based semantic annotations.
src/folder_structure_visualizer.egg-info: Generated installation metadata for the editable Python package.
Records legacy dependency-link metadata generated by the packaging toolchain.
Records the installed folderviz console-script entry point.
Stores generated package metadata derived from pyproject.toml.
Records generated dependency and optional development requirement metadata.
Lists source files included in the generated package manifest.
Records the package's top-level import name.
tests/test_cli.py: Verifies CLI orchestration and generated output files.
tests/test_render_mermaid.py: Verifies Mermaid labels, edges, directions, colors, and escaping.
tests/test_render_tree.py: Verifies plain-text hierarchy and semantic annotation rendering.
tests/test_scanner.py: Verifies directory traversal, filtering, depth, files, and annotation attachment.
